memoryArtifacts.headline: The family of John Howland, Mayflower passenger: five generations by Hunter, Mardenna Johnson, 1910- pg 1
1672  John and Elizabeth lived with their son, Jabez in this home in Plymouth
memoryArtifacts.description: The Jabez Howland house in Plymouth was built about 1667.  John and Elizabeth Howland lived with their son Jabez in this house during the winters, and Elizabeth also lived their after the death of her husband in 1672.

memoryArtifacts.headline: In Memory of John and Joan Tilley...
3rd Generation Mayflower Families Through Five Generations Vol. 11 Part 3 Edward Doty.
Howland House in Plymouth, MA where both John and Elizabeth lived at one point
memoryArtifacts.description: Only remaining house in Plymouth, MA where an actual passenger on the Mayflower lived

memoryArtifacts.headline: Chipman Thanksgiving Story.mp3
memoryArtifacts.description: Part I - John Howland and Elizabeth Tilley (lst Thanksgiving)..Part II - John Chipman and Hope Howland.. Part III - Reverend John Lathrop...Narrators are Dean and Phyllis Chipman and Ralph and Colleen Chipman.  Recorded 1986.

popularStory.headline: Arthur Howland 1602
popularStory.description: Arthur Howland, the oldest of three brothers came to New Plymouth about1623/4 with his brother Henry, where he lived a few years and then becamea landholder and resident of Marshfield, Massachusetts. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Howland於大約1599年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓時，他的父親Henry Howland Of Fenstanton36歲，母親Margaret34歲。他於1623年3月25日與Elizabeth Tilley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1643年住在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯。他去世於1673年2月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯金斯頓洛基 努可享年75歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Howland于大约1599年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓时，他的父亲Henry Howland Of Fenstanton36岁，母亲Margaret34岁。他于1623年3月25日与Elizabeth Tilley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1643年住在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯。他去世于1673年2月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯金斯頓洛基 努可享年75岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Howland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Howland was born about 1599, in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England, his father, Henry Howland Of Fenstanton, was 36 and his mother, Margaret, was 34. He married Elizabeth Tilley on 25 March 1623, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States in 1643. He died on 23 February 1673, in Rocky Nook, Kingston, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 75, and was buried in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Howland est né environ 1599, à Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Howland Of Fenstanton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Tilley le 25 mars 1623, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1643. Il est décédé le 23 février 1673, à Rocky Nook, Kingston, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Howland um 1599 in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Howland Of Fenstanton 36 und seine Mutter Margaret 34. Er hat am 25. März 1623 in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Tilley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1643 hat er in Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 23. Februar 1673 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Rocky Nook, Kingston, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Howland è nato il circa 1599 nel Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Howland Of Fenstanton, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Tilley il 25 marzo 1623, nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1643. Morì il 23 febbraio 1673, nel Rocky Nook, Kingston, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Howlandが約1599年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントンで生まれた時，父Henry Howland Of Fenstantonは36歳，母Margaretは34歳であった。1623年3月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスでElizabeth Tilleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1643年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスに住んでいた。彼は1673年2月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスキングストンロクイ ノオクで75歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Howland(이)가 대략 1599년 영국 헌틴그도실르 펜스탠턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Howland Of Fenstanton(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1623년 3월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 Elizabeth Tilley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1643년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스에서 살았다. 그는 1673년 2월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 킨그스턴 록이 노옥에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Howland nasceu aproximadamente 1599, em Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Howland Of Fenstanton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Tilley em 25 de março de 1623, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1643. Ele faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1673, em Rocky Nook, Kingston, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Howland родился около 1599 г. в местности фенстантон, хантингдоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Howland Of Fenstanton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Tilley 25 марта 1623 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1643 году. Он умер 23 февраля 1673 г. в местности рокки нук, кингстон, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
